task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main workspace screen is visible, indicating the user has bypassed the login screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Custom Sounds administration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration or Workspace settings panel is open, specifically showing the 'Custom Sounds' page or menu item selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the custom sound 'release_ping' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A custom sound entry named 'release_ping' is visible in the Custom Sounds list, or a file upload dialog/form for the sound is shown being submitted with the name 'release_ping'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the #release-updates channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The '#release-updates' channel is open and active, with its name visible in the main chat header.

task_completion.description: Verify the #release-updates channel is configured to use the 'release_ping' sound.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Notification Preferences modal or sidebar for the #release-updates channel is open, and the audio/sound notification dropdown is explicitly set to 'release_ping'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Rocket.Chat web/desktop interface (menus, modals, dropdowns) rather than terminal windows executing API curl commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely uploaded the audio file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A system file browser dialog should be visible at some point selecting the '/home/ga/release_ping.wav' file, rather than the agent mocking the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the functional Rocket.Chat application, not a text editor modifying local HTML/configuration files to fake the visual output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target channel: #release-updates. Target custom sound name: 'release_ping'. Target sound file path: /home/ga/release_ping.wav. Ensure the custom sound is named exactly 'release_ping' and applied specifically to the '#release-updates' channel's notification settings.
